rationale: For an internal operations dashboard (RefillOps), utility, clarity, and density are paramount. The design must facilitate fast, error-free data entry and rapid scanning of jobs and stock levels by plant workers, often on mobile devices. The visual language is authoritative, crisp, and functional.

rules: No generic fonts like Inter or Roboto.
Data tables must use tabular-nums for predictable column widths.
Monetary values (₹) and quantities must be clearly delineated, using medium or semi-bold weights.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

containers.card: bg-white rounded-md border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#152c4b] active:bg-[#0f2038] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E3A5F] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 transition-colors

forms.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E3A5F] focus:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5
forms.table_input: h-8 px-2 text-sm border-slate-200 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1E3A5F]

tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-4 py-3

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

tabs.trigger: flex-1 flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-white transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1E3A5F] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-slate-900 data-[state=active]:shadow-sm

navigation.desktop_sidebar: w-64 bg-[#1E3A5F] text-white flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#152c4b] fixed inset-y-0 left-0
navigation.desktop_nav_item: flex items-center px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md mx-2 mb-1 text-slate-300 hover:bg-[#152c4b] hover:text-white transition-colors
navigation.desktop_nav_item_active: flex items-center px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md mx-2 mb-1 bg-[#152c4b] text-white
navigation.mobile_bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center h-16 px-2 z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
navigation.mobile_nav_item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full text-slate-500 hover:text-[#1E3A5F]
navigation.mobile_nav_item_active: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full text-[#1E3A5F]

icons.instructions: Use standard functional icons. Dashboard: LayoutDashboard, Jobs: ClipboardList, Parties: Users, Stock: Package, History: History, New Job: Plus, Edit: Edit2, Delete: Trash2, Print: Printer.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle background shifts on rows (bg-slate-50) and buttons.
interactions_and_motion.active: Scale down slightly (transform scale-95) on buttons.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' globally for color and shadow changes.

testing_conventions.rule: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

image_urls.empty: No external images required for this internal tool.
